name: Lucy's Old Fashioned Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the sugar and Crisco together.
2. Add the egg yolks and vanilla to the mixture.
3. Mix in the dry ingredients: rice flour, potato starch, cornstarch, tapioca flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Work the dough with your hands until you can form it into balls.
5. Roll the dough out to a thickness of 1/8 inch on waxed paper.
6. Bake on a greased cookie sheet at 375°F for 8-10 minutes.
These cookies have been tested by both kids and adults, and I personally enjoy them as well.
